notice: Public menu content. Prices, availability, and dietary indicators remain to be added after operational approval.

collections.name: House Signatures
collections.description: Permanent compositions that carry the clearest expression of SIP.

drinks.name: Presence
drinks.menuLine: Blackberry · Black Tea · Charred Orange · Allspice
drinks.description: Blackberry and black tea unfold through charred orange and warm allspice, then resolve into a dry mineral finish. Rich at first, composed from beginning to end.
drinks.closingLine: Stay for the moment. Remember the night.
drinks.garnish: Thin charred-orange crescent and one ripe blackberry on a minimal gold pick

experience.midPalate: Structured black tea and allspice warmth

drinks.pairing: Charred jerk mushrooms with roasted plantain and tamarind glaze

drinks.name: Clarity
drinks.menuLine: Green Grape · Cucumber · White Tea · Citrus Blossom
drinks.description: Clarified green grape and cool cucumber meet white tea and citrus blossom in a pale, crystalline composition. Luminous at the opening, quietly floral through the middle, and mineral-dry at the finish.
drinks.garnish: Translucent cucumber ribbon and one tiny white edible blossom

experience.aroma: Cool cucumber, green grape, soft blossom
experience.midPalate: Delicate white tea and restrained florals

drinks.pairing: Callaloo croquettes with green mango and cashew-lime crema

drinks.name: Legacy
drinks.direction: Sorrel · ginger · pimento · citrus · aromatic spice

drinks.name: Renaissance
drinks.direction: Guava · passion fruit · hibiscus · lime · gentle spice
